description: All phases use aggregate test modules instead of exact product-local per-Spec test paths and one-Spec Build Receipts.

description: Independent evaluator identities, calibration, and eligibility decisions are represented structurally but not executed as a distinct evaluator runtime.

description: Full migration matrices and fault injection at every persistence boundary are not demonstrated.
